zh.lifeSummary: Margarery Ferguson於1389年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。她於1409年與John Brown在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ferguson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fergus ‘son of Fearghus’ (see Fergus ) by substituting -son for mac-.

variants.name: Fergus
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, formed with fear ‘man’ + gus ‘vigor, force’. This was the name of an early Irish mythological figure, a valiant warrior, also of the grandfather of Saint Columba.
Scottish and English: from the Gaelic personal name Fearghus (see 1 above).

variants.name: Furgason
meanings: Scottish, Irish, and English: altered form of Scottish   Ferguson  .

variants.name: Fergerson
meanings: Scottish, Irish, and English: variant of   Ferguson  .

variants.name: Fergeson
meanings: Scottish, Irish, and English: variant of   Ferguson  .

variants.name: Fergason
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Ferguson  .

variants.name: Furgerson
meanings: Scottish, Irish, and English: altered form of Scottish   Ferguson  .

variants.name: Furgeson
meanings: Scottish, Irish, and English: altered form of Scottish   Ferguson  .

en.lifeSummary: Margarery Ferguson was born in 1389, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. She married John Brown in 1409, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarery Fergusonは1389年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた。1409年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでJohn Brownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarery Ferguson(은)는 1389년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1409년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 John Brown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margarery Ferguson родилась в 1389 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Brown в 1409 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия.
